import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut xs = nums
while xs.len() > 0
  let m = match list.min(xs)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let idx = match list.index_of(xs, m)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
  mut new_xs: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  for x in xs
    if j != idx
      new_xs = list.push(new_xs, x)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  xs = new_xs
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
